title: Nob #5011
definition:
Nob = "high place"

 1) a priestly city in the Benjamin situated on some eminence north
    but near Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nob = "high place"

 1) a priestly city in the Benjamin situated on some eminence north
    but near Jerusalem

    NASB:  a priestly city, perh. also a place N. of Jer.
